strengths: Extensive cross-stack expertise in full-stack, embedded, and infrastructure development with strong polyglot programming skills (TypeScript, D, Java, Node.js, etc.)
Demonstrated entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective, an open-source platform used by NGOs, showcasing product ownership and AI/geospatial integration potential

Proven track record in optimizing systems for scale (e.g., low-latency microservices handling millions of requests/sec) and driving technical innovation through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions
concerns: Limited explicit AI expertise or recognized products/platforms built with AI (job requires 'recognised expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI')
Most recent role (Staff Software Engineer at re:cinq) lasted only 6 months, raising questions about role stability or fit
No advanced degree (MS/PhD) in an AI-related field, which is a preferred qualification
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical versatility and entrepreneurial experience, with a proven ability to drive innovation and optimize systems at scale. However, his lack of explicit AI expertise, short tenure in the most recent role, and absence of an advanced degree in an AI-related field may hinder alignment with the core AI strategy focus of the Principal Engineer role.
